rule_metadata.name: Fidelis_Advisory_Purchase_Order_pps
rule_metadata.description: Detects a string found in a malicious document named Purchase_Order.pps
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Fidelis_Advisory_Purchase_Order_pps
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a string found in a malicious document named Purchase_Order.pps"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "http://goo.gl/ZjJyti"
		date = "2015-06-09"

	strings:
		$s0 = "Users\\Gozie\\Desktop\\Purchase-Order.gif" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: Fidelis_Advisory_cedt370
rule_metadata.description: Detects a string found in memory of malware cedt370r(3).exe
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Fidelis_Advisory_cedt370
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a string found in memory of malware cedt370r(3).exe"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "http://goo.gl/ZjJyti"
		date = "2015-06-09"

	strings:
		$s0 = "PO.exe" ascii fullword
		$s1 = "Important.exe" ascii fullword
		$s2 = "&username=" ascii fullword
		$s3 = "Browsers.txt" ascii fullword

	condition:
		all of them
}
